notes: SHIP v1.14.228 — FLAT-FIT + MINI + Command-lens hardening (per HANDOFF-v1.14.225-flatfit-lens-taps; ships as .228 since .225/.226 were taken). (1) FLAT rack elevation now fits the whole 48U in one viewport, no internal scroll: redesign-only --u-h CSS var — rackElevation_buildHtml branches on redesign_isOn() so LEGACY emits byte-identical fixed-44px markup and RD emits calc(var(--u-h)*n); new rackFlat_applyFit() measures grid-top->#rd-botnav-top post-mount and sets --u-h=avail/totalU; body.rd CSS retargets the gridline pitch + u-marker to var(--u-h,44px) and relaxes the 60vh caps (overflow-y:auto kept as a safety net so cramped viewports can still scroll). (2) Ghost fix: the FLAT block fill matched only 6 EXACT type strings, so GPU trays typed compute/accelerator (GB200/GB300 vocab) rendered TRANSPARENT while the alias-normalized COMPONENTS strip counted them racked — added body.rd-scoped alias color rules mirroring the strip's alias map (compute/accelerator->gpu cyan, leaf/spine->switch violet, disk/nvme->storage gold, host/node->server slate, router/firewall/nic->network violet-bright, pdu/fan/crah/crac->cooling green). (3) MINI strip (redesign-only): un-dim (opacity 0.32->0.9), proportional-height floor 1.2->0.4 so blocks mirror the elevation, track snugged to the canvas height so U markers align, glass ring frame preserved; all body.rd-scoped. (4) Command lens: un-silenced two catch(_){} (cmd_route + showWorkTab issues/BLOCKERS branch) -> phantom_logErr + phantomToast (no-silent-failure rule). NOTE: the 3 stat cards were ALREADY tap-through since .225 (RACKS->rd_openOpsTool('rackmap') kept per owner; BLOCKERS->cmd_route work/issues; DEPLOYS->cmd_route work/deploy; .cc-tap press state already present) — Item 2 reduced to the two un-silences. Discovery ran as a 4-agent workflow. ADVERSARIAL REVIEW: ecc:silent-failure-hunter CLEAN; ecc:code-reviewer APPROVE (0 crit/high) — its MEDIUM (my border:none killed the glass ring -> dropped it, glass rule owns the frame) + LOW (overflow-y:hidden->auto safety net) FIXED before push. Gates: 4 inline <script> blocks node-checked OK, CSS braces balanced 3760/3760, CRLF preserved, three-stamp lockstep .227->.228. ?legacy=1 BYTE-IDENTICAL (builder legacy branch emits identical px markup; every CSS change body.rd-scoped; scrubbar legacy keeps the 1.2 floor). Pending-ghost (racked-vs-pending visual) DEFERRED to Part A — slots carry no status field yet, so today every present device = racked = solid. ROLLBACK: git revert clean (additive, no structural removals). DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD STOP, John on iPhone): (1) FLAT lens shows all 48U on one screen with no scroll; racked slots render SOLID incl. GPU (was ghost-faint); (2) tap a U-row/device -> its detail; (3) MINI = true thumbnail: device count matches the elevation + header, positions correct, ring frame present, reads solid not faint; (4) Command RACKS/BLOCKERS/DEPLOYS: full-card tap -> correct destination, press state visible, BLOCKERS at 00 lands on empty state (not a dead tap); (5) ?legacy=1 unchanged. This is a 7th ship on the open batch (.220/.221/.224/.225/.226/.227 owed) — verify alongside the batch.
